name: Kinich - Cooking
description:
Hiiii!!!~ 💚

Is it a surprise that I’m obsessed w him? 😶‍🌫️

(He’s my new main and he’s done more damage so far than my Hu Tao has collectively for an entire year so like I think it’s time to bench Miss funeral lady 😭)

I based this bot off of possibly my favorite head-canon I have, which is he loves dark chocolate. 🍫 😋

(You know, because we got a cooking recipe for chocolate while in Natlan, which obviously makes sense because of where Natlan is based off of.)

Am I making this too detailed? Yes, yes I am. 🫠

Bot info!~

You two decided to cook before going on a bounty, even when he said the food would only weigh you down. (Idk yall, I was half asleep and listening to Laufey when making this so prepare for a shitty bot)

Look at the actual bot for more context 🙃

‧+ ̊🍃✩ + ̊🦎⊹♡

(I wanna improve, so please give me recommendations on how to improve it and tell me any errors you come across while chatting in the comments! ☺️)
creator: Lizz_The_Lizard
